disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fingers changed colour in a sequence — white, then bluish, then bright red — over about an hour
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your fingers looked like as this happened?
Did the colour change in stages?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They went completely white and dead first, then a bluish colour, and now they're bright red and throbbing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The episode was brought on by going out into the cold
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when this started?
Was there any trigger, like cold or stress?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started right after I went outside into the cold to get the mail.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both hands are affected in the same, symmetrical way rather than a single hand or finger
trigger_question_examples: Is it one hand or both?
Are both hands affected the same way?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both hands, pretty much the same on each side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Earlier the fingers felt numb and 'dead'; now the recovery phase is intensely painful, throbbing and burning
trigger_question_examples: Were your fingers numb at any point?
What does the pain feel like now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They were totally numb and dead-feeling when they were white; now they're throbbing and burning as they've gone red.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A new medication was started recently by the GP to prevent migraines
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medications recently?
What are you taking for your migraines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My doctor started me on a new tablet a little while ago to stop my migraines.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The skin of the fingers looks intact to the patient — no black areas, ulcers or broken skin
trigger_question_examples: Is any of the skin turning black, or are there any sores or broken skin?
Do the fingers look damaged in any way?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the skin looks okay to me — no black bits or sores, just very red.
